title: Government Says Terabytes of Signal Chats are Central to the Case Against Minnesota 15
snippet:
The Minnesota 15 case is about conversations, thousands of pages of it, harvested from encrypted group chats on Signal and loaded into an Everlaw database for prosecutors to build conspiracy charges against Trump's political opponents.
